# Performance Budget

Marketing pages need visual assets, but assets must not make the page feel broken.

## Baseline Rules

- Use appropriately sized raster images.
- Avoid autoplay media unless it is essential and accessible.
- Lazy-load below-the-fold heavy media.
- Keep animations purposeful and pause-friendly.

## Evidence Boundary

Performance scores require Lighthouse or a project-specific metric report. Manual observation is not a performance score.
